overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character running through a dense forest transitioning to open prairie during golden hour. The character follows a winding dirt trail toward a distant smoke plume visible on the horizon.

agents.ego_description: running steadily along a narrow dirt trail shaded by massive oak trees

entered.detail: large ancient oak tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches dominating the forest canopy
narrow winding dirt path covered with patches of grass and leaves
dense green shrubs and tall grass lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a dense oak forest along a narrow dirt trail. Massive trees block most of the sky, creating a shaded environment with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy. The path is surrounded by thick underbrush and vegetation.

events.description: exiting dense tree cover into direct golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along widening trail past large rock formations on the right

entered.detail: large gray boulder formation emerging from the grassy hillside
group of tall pine trees visible in the distance ahead
open grassy area beginning to appear between the trees

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up as the character runs past a large rock formation on the right. The trail widens and more sky becomes visible. The lighting shifts from shaded to direct sunlight as the character leaves the dense oak canopy behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with distant smoke plume

events.description: distant smoke column becomes visible rising on the horizon

agents.ego_description: running across open grassland toward a distant smoke plume

entered.detail: tall column of dark smoke rising vertically into the sky from beyond the treeline
hazy mountains visible on the horizon beneath the smoke
expansive grassy prairie with scattered wildflowers and tall grass

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide-open prairie with full sky visibility. A prominent smoke plume rises in the distance, marking a point of interest ahead. The terrain becomes more open with distant mountains visible on the horizon as the character continues running along the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shaded oak forest that gradually opens into a vast, sunlit prairie. It begins with the character running along a narrow dirt trail where massive trees and thick underbrush create a canopy of dappled sunlight. As the character passes a large rock formation, the forest begins to thin and the trail widens, allowing the lighting to shift from deep shade to direct sunlight. The scene then expands into a wide-open prairie under a full sky, revealing distant mountains on the horizon. Finally, the camera tracks the character's progress toward a prominent plume of smoke rising in the distance.
